title: bromus ramosus subvar. cristatus
intro: Bromus ramosus subvar. cristatus, commonly known as Crested Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Crested Brome has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be dried and used in various forms of herbal preparations.
